onboarding.language_subtitle: Select the language for Mima's interface
onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Your intelligent personal assistant. I'm here to help you manage your day, emails, and much more.
onboarding.voice_subtitle: Select the voice that suits you best
onboarding.voice_preview_text: Hi, I'm Mima, your intelligent personal assistant.
onboarding.permissions_subtitle: To help you better, I need access to your calendar and emails.
onboarding.ready_subtitle: You can now start chatting with me.
onboarding.final_subtitle: Mima is ready to help you with anything you need.

chat.welcome_message: Hi! I'm Mima. How can I help you today?
chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Mima. How can I help you today?
chat.history_subtitle: Open a recent conversation or start a new one.
chat.history_empty: Your recent conversations will appear here after you start a new chat.
chat.history_clear_error: I couldn't fully clear the previous chat. Please try again.
chat.attachment_unsupported: Some files are not supported yet. Use images, PDF, TXT, CSV, JSON, Markdown, or Office documents.
chat.tasks_subtitle: What Mima is keeping in mind for you.
chat.tasks_empty: You have no open tasks right now.
chat.error_message: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.voice_not_found: Voice not configured. Please go to profile.

profile.title: Profile
profile.username_hint: If the username already exists, Mima will add a numeric suffix automatically.
profile.photo_upload_error: Could not save the profile photo on this device.
profile.google_subtitle: Reconnect Google here if Calendar or Gmail ask for new permissions.
profile.google_permissions_hint: If event creation fails, reconnect Google to refresh Calendar write access.
profile.google_write_required: Google needs renewed write permissions so Mima can create events and drafts again. Reconnect your account.
profile.voice_subtitle: Choose how your assistant speaks to you

inbox.title: Mima Inbox
inbox.connect_description: Link your Google account to allow Mima to read, summarize, and draft replies to your emails.
inbox.detail_error: I couldn't load this email right now.
inbox.no_body: This message has no readable body.
inbox.attachment_analysis_error: I couldn't analyze this attachment right now.
inbox.saved_drafts_empty: You have no saved drafts right now.
inbox.draft_ready_hint: The draft is saved in Gmail and ready for review before sending.
inbox.token_expired: Google connection expired. Please reconnect your account.
inbox.permission_denied: Insufficient permissions. Please verify Gmail API is enabled.
inbox.draft_error: I couldn't create the Gmail draft right now.
inbox.reconnect_required: Gmail needs write permissions. Reconnect Google so Mima can create and send drafts again.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.connect_description: Link your Google account to allow Mima to manage your schedule, create events, and find free time.
calendar.token_expired: Google connection expired. Please reconnect your account.
calendar.permission_denied: Insufficient permissions. Please verify Calendar API is enabled.
calendar.reconnect_required: Google Calendar needs write permissions. Reconnect Google so Mima can create and edit events again.

auth.sign_in_subtitle: Enter your details to access Mima.
auth.sign_up_subtitle: Sign up to get started with your AI assistant.
auth.google_error: Google authentication failed. Please try again.

workspace.title: Mima workspace
workspace.subtitle: Tasks and Gmail drafts in one place.

install_pwa.title: Install Mima
install_pwa.ios_subtitle: Install this app on your iPhone for a better experience.
install_pwa.install_subtitle: Add the app to your home screen

google_callback.processing_description: Please wait while we complete the authentication.

common.allow_popups: Please allow popups for this site to connect your account.
